user.title: Base settings
user.description: Fill in the zones, flow rates and soil type here.

user.title: Advanced options in the UI
user.description: Fill in the weather entity and extra sensors if you have them. If ETP is not provided, it is calculated automatically from weather.

set_mode.name: Set mode
set_mode.description: Chooses a mode (Overseeding, Treatment, etc.) and updates the calculations.

set_date_action.name: Record date
set_date_action.description: Sets the real date of the intervention (DD/MM/YYYY). If empty, today is used.

reset_mode.name: Back to normal mode
reset_mode.description: Resets the system to Normal mode.

start_manual_irrigation.name: Manual watering
start_manual_irrigation.description: Starts a manual watering cycle and specifies how much water to apply in mm.

objectif_mm.name: Water to apply
objectif_mm.description: Amount of water to apply in millimeters.

start_auto_irrigation.name: Automatic watering
start_auto_irrigation.description: Runs each zone in sequence with the configured flow rate. If the water amount is empty, it uses the calculated value automatically.

objectif_mm.name: Water to apply (optional)
objectif_mm.description: Water amount in mm. If omitted, uses the objective calculated by the current mode.

declare_intervention.name: Declare an intervention
declare_intervention.description: Logs a real intervention and can remember the product, dose, and next reapplication.

date_action.name: Action date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in DD/MM/YYYY format. If empty, today is used.

produit_id.name: Product ID (optional)
produit_id.description: Identifier of a product saved in the local database.

produit.name: Product (optional)
produit.description: Name of the product or reference applied.

dose.name: Dose (optional)
dose.description: Applied dose, free text if needed.

register_product.name: Register a product
register_product.description: Adds or updates a custom product in the local database.

reapplication_after_days.name: Reapply in X days (optional)
reapplication_after_days.description: Recommended delay before using it again.

delai_avant_tonte_jours.name: Delay before mowing (optional)
delai_avant_tonte_jours.description: Time to wait before the next mow.

remove_product.name: Remove a product
remove_product.description: Removes a product from the local database.

product_id.name: Product ID
product_id.description: Identifier of the product to delete.

declare_mowing.name: Declare mowing
declare_mowing.description: Logs a mowing event in the history.

date_action.name: Mowing date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in DD/MM/YYYY format. If empty, today is used.

declare_watering.name: Declare watering
declare_watering.description: Logs a watering event in the history.

date_action.name: Watering date (optional)
date_action.description: Date in DD/MM/YYYY format. If empty, today is used.

objectif_mm.name: Applied amount (optional)
objectif_mm.description: Amount of water applied in mm.
